title: Add BM logo background and About/Why Choose Us sections to TrustedElectricalContractorsPage

requirements.summary: Add BM logo (download-4.webp) as large, faint background image below the names section
acceptanceCriteria: The BM logo (download-4.webp) is displayed as a background image
The logo appears faint/translucent to not overpower foreground content
The logo is positioned below the names section
The logo is displayed in a large size

file_operations.description: Add the BM logo (download-4.webp) as a large, faint background image positioned below the names section. Reference the asset at frontend/public/assets/download-4.webp. Apply CSS styling to make the logo semi-transparent (opacity ~0.1-0.15), center it horizontally, position it below the existing names/credentials section, and scale it to a large size (e.g., width: 600-800px). Use absolute or fixed positioning within a relative container to avoid disrupting existing layout flow.

requirements.summary: Add 'About BM ENTERPRISES' section with company description
acceptanceCriteria: An 'About BM ENTERPRISES' section is present on the page
The section includes the full company description text provided by the user
The text is properly formatted and readable

file_operations.description: Add an 'About BM ENTERPRISES' section to the page with the provided company description: 'BM ENTERPRISES is a leading electrical contracting company specializing in commercial, industrial, and residential electrical installations. With hundreds of completed projects and a team of certified electricians and engineers, we deliver excellence in every project.' Position this section after the hero/names area and before the 'Why Choose Us' section. Use semantic HTML (e.g., <section>) with an <h2> heading and paragraph text. Apply consistent styling with existing sections using Tailwind utility classes.

requirements.summary: Add 'Why Choose Us' section with four highlighted features
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Why Choose Us' section is present with four distinct feature cards or highlights
Each feature includes its title and full description text as provided
The features are visually distinct and easy to scan

file_operations.description: Add a 'Why Choose Us' section featuring four distinct highlights: (1) Safety First - 'We follow rigorous safety protocols and ensure full compliance with industry standards', (2) Quality Assured - 'Our team of certified professionals uses only premium materials and proven methods', (3) On-Time Delivery - 'We pride ourselves on efficient project management and timely completion', (4) Expert Solutions - 'We provide innovative electrical solutions tailored to your specific needs'. Display these as cards or grid items with icons, titles, and description text. Use a responsive grid layout (e.g., 2x2 on desktop, stacked on mobile) with shadcn Card components or custom styled divs. Position this section after the 'About' section and before the call-to-action.

requirements.summary: Add 'Ready to Start Your Project?' call-to-action section
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Ready to Start Your Project?' heading is displayed
The section is visually prominent to encourage user action

file_operations.description: Add a 'Ready to Start Your Project?' call-to-action section at the bottom of the page content (before the footer). Include the heading 'Ready to Start Your Project?' and the CTA text 'Contact us today for a consultation and discover how we can power your success'. Style this section prominently with centered text, larger font size, and high contrast background (e.g., primary color background with white text) to draw user attention. Optionally include a button linking to the enquiry page using TanStack Router Link component.
